page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden Boy meets Girl
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Kobunsha on 10 October 1998. https://mediaarts-db.bunka.go.jp/id/M416637

ISBN-13: ISBN ‎978-4334804343
